title: Chasm of Glass and Steel
caption: Looking straight up into the towering geometry of financial district skyscrapers.
story: Looking skyward from the foot of Wall Street creates a narrow slice of sky enclosed by towering monoliths of steel and glass. Geometric symmetry meets harsh industrial scale.
curatorNote: Bold vertical leading lines. Excellent monochrome conversion candidate.
altText: Low angle view of massive glass skyscrapers reaching into the sky forming a canyon effect.
